title: Cracca wallichii
taxonomy: Cracca wallichii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Cracca, which is a group of plants within the Fabaceae family. The plant is native to the Himalayan region and is also known to be found in parts of Asia. Cracca wallichii is often considered a synonym of the species Dalbergia wallichii. However, the exact classification of Cracca wallichii may vary depending on the source.
